node.name: Meet at mine
node.story: Android project I build together with Yusuf, Catalin and Kristian for the VIA Semester project. The requirement was to build a social app, we came up with the idea to build an app to organize meetings at someone's house, so we named it Meet at mine. Not much was learned from this project, since it looked so much like the Android project we did.

node.description: Semester 1 group project for VIA University. Built using JavaFx.
node.name: Hotel booking system
node.story: The first semester group project we had at VIA. The task was to build a booking system for a hotel that was using an old ledger. No database was required so the data was stored in binary files as serialized Java Objects. This was a group project and I had 3 team members

node.description: Semester 2 group project for VIA University. Built using JavaFx SceneBuilder.
node.name: Employee management system
node.story:
The second semester project we had at VIA University. This was more complex than the first one since the requirements were to build a client-server system that supported multiple clients and a database in Postgres. The team was the same as in the first semester, the difference was that now we worked Agile and this was a big part of the project. 
Full process report, project report and SCRUM documentation were required. The profile pictures used in the project image are cached google image pictures.
